messages.content: 中译英：作为我的《金融学》课程的课代表，她尽心尽责、善于沟通，能够做到将作业信息和收集、记录作业提交情况以及我的反馈准确传递给同学们，并同时将同学们的情况即使反馈给我。

As the class representative for my "Finance" course, she is dedicated, responsible, and skilled in communication. She is able to effectively relay assignment information, collect and record the submission status of assignments, and accurately transmit my feedback to my classmates. She also promptly provides me with updates on my classmates' situations.

润色如下内容：As the class representative for my “Finance” course, she is dedicated, responsible, and skilled in communication. She is able to effectively relay assignment information, collect and record the submission status of assignments, and accurately transmit my feedback to my classmates. She also promptly provides me with updates on my classmates’ situations.

As the class representative for my "Finance" course, she demonstrates strong dedication, responsibility, and effective communication skills. She efficiently relays assignment details, diligently collects and records the submission status of assignments, and precisely conveys my feedback to my classmates. Moreover, she promptly updates me on any developments concerning my classmates' situations.

润色如下内容：Owing to the above performance, I firmly believe that Miss ZENG is a promising student, and strongly recommend him to you. I think he will be a great addition to your graduate program and you will not be disappointed by his efforts to excel and fit into your university. If you have any question at all about Miss Xi ZENG, please do not hesitate to contact me directly.

Based on the aforementioned accomplishments, I have complete confidence in Miss ZENG's potential as a student and wholeheartedly recommend her to you. I believe she would be an excellent candidate for your graduate program, showcasing her determination to excel and seamlessly integrate into your university. Should you have any inquiries regarding Miss Xi ZENG, please feel free to reach out to me directly without any hesitation.
中译英：2022年9月，她加入了我有关延迟消费、消费类型、自我构念三者联系结构最新研究的项目组，并从书写项目申请书开始全程参与项目。

In September 2022, she joined my research team working on the latest study regarding the relationship structure between delayed consumption, types of consumption, and self-construal. She has been involved in the project from the very beginning, starting with writing the project proposal.

润色如下内容：In September 2022, she joined my research team working on the latest study regarding the relationship structure between delayed consumption, types of consumption, and self-construal. She has been involved in the project from the very beginning, starting with writing the project proposal.

In September 2022, she became a member of my research team dedicated to investigating the intricate relationship between delayed consumption, different types of consumption, and self-construal. She has been actively engaged in the project right from its inception, contributing significantly to the development of the project proposal.
润色如下内容：In the capacity of her supervisor, I thus have a good chance to observe Miss ZENG's performance and am qualified to provide an appraisal of her potential.
As her supervisor, I have had ample opportunity to observe Miss ZENG's performance and am well-positioned to provide an evaluation of her potential.
中译英：她能够通过自行阅读大量文献，了解相关的研究领域。在项目初期，所有的小组成员会大量地在国内外各大学术平台上搜集相关文献，并按心理学文献汇报的标准，对重要文献进行汇报。在同组的成员中，每一次她的汇报都能得到我的赞赏，因为她的汇报十分的严谨且融入了自己的思考，能够展现一定的学术思维。

She has demonstrated the ability to independently read and comprehend a significant amount of literature related to the research field. During the initial stages of the project, all team members extensively gathered relevant literature from various domestic and international academic platforms. Following the standards of psychological literature reporting, each member presented on important papers. Among the team, I consistently appreciated her presentations, as they were meticulous, incorporated her own reflections, and showcased her academic thinking.

润色如下内容:She has demonstrated the ability to independently read and comprehend a significant amount of literature related to the research field. During the initial stages of the project, all team members extensively gathered relevant literature from various domestic and international academic platforms. Following the standards of psychological literature reporting, each member presented on important papers. Among the team, I consistently appreciated her presentations, as they were meticulous, incorporated her own reflections, and showcased her academic thinking.

She has shown a remarkable proficiency in independently reading and comprehending a substantial body of literature pertaining to the research field. In the early stages of the project, all team members conducted extensive research and collected relevant literature from diverse domestic and international academic platforms. Adhering to the criteria of psychological literature reporting, each member presented their findings on significant papers. Among the team, I consistently admired her presentations for their meticulousness, integration of personal reflections, and demonstration of her scholarly thinking.
中译英：在研究过程中，她还跟着网络上的教程，自主学习了python和机器学习的部分内容，为后续使用爬虫在购物平台上爬取消费评论等数据，以及使用psychopy编写电脑案件实验并发布至脑岛平台搜集数据等研究打下了基础。

Throughout the research process, she took the initiative to follow online tutorials and independently learn certain aspects of Python and machine learning. This laid the foundation for subsequent tasks such as using web scraping techniques to collect consumer review data from e-commerce platforms and utilizing Psychopy to design computer-based experiments and publish them on the Brain Island platform for data collection.

润色如下内容：Throughout the research process, she took the initiative to follow online tutorials and independently learn certain aspects of Python and machine learning. This laid the foundation for subsequent tasks such as using web scraping techniques to collect consumer review data from e-commerce platforms and utilizing Psychopy to design computer-based experiments and publish them on the Brain Island platform for data collection.

During the research process, she proactively followed online tutorials and autonomously acquired knowledge in Python and machine learning. This solidified the groundwork for various subsequent tasks, including web scraping to gather consumer review data from e-commerce platforms and utilizing Psychopy to develop computer-based experiments, subsequently publishing them on the Brain Island platform for data collection.
中译英：我非常欣赏她的灵活的思维。在研究过程中，她总能找到旁人找不到的角度，提出自己的观点和研究思路，并在研究陷入僵局时，提出一些变通方法。

I greatly admire her flexible thinking. Throughout the research process, she consistently manages to approach problems from perspectives that others may overlook, offering her unique viewpoints and research ideas. Moreover, whenever the research encounters obstacles, she skillfully proposes alternative methods to break through impasses.

润色如下内容：I greatly admire her flexible thinking. Throughout the research process, she consistently manages to approach problems from perspectives that others may overlook, offering her unique viewpoints and research ideas. Moreover, whenever the research encounters obstacles, she skillfully proposes alternative methods to break through impasses.

I hold a deep admiration for her flexible thinking. Throughout the research process, she consistently demonstrates the ability to explore problems from unconventional angles, presenting unique perspectives and innovative research ideas. Furthermore, whenever the research encounters obstacles, she displays remarkable skill in proposing alternative methods to overcome stalemates.
中译英：作为项目里唯一有心理学基础的成员，
As the sole member in the project with a background in psychology,
